business.name: Iron Temple Fitness
business.description: Iron Temple Fitness is more than a gym — it's a community of dedicated athletes pushing limits every day. State-of-the-art equipment, expert trainers, and an atmosphere that demands your best.

services.name: Personal Training
services.description: One-on-one sessions with a certified trainer tailored to your goals. Includes fitness assessment and custom program.

services.name: Group Classes
services.description: High-energy group workouts including HIIT, spin, boxing, and yoga. All fitness levels welcome.

services.name: Nutrition Coaching
services.description: Personalized meal plans, macro tracking, and bi-weekly check-ins with our nutrition specialist.

services.name: Open Gym Access
services.description: 24/7 access to all equipment, locker rooms, and recovery area. No contracts.

team.name: Marcus Johnson
team.bio: 15+ years experience. Former college athlete. NASM & ACE certified.

team.name: Sarah Chen
team.bio: RYT-500 certified. Specializes in recovery and flexibility training.

team.name: David Okafor
team.bio: CSCS certified. Works with athletes from high school to pro level.

team.name: Lisa Park
team.bio: Registered dietitian with a focus on sports nutrition and body composition.

testimonials.name: Kevin R.
testimonials.text: Iron Temple changed my life. Down 40 lbs and stronger than ever. The trainers actually care.

testimonials.name: Amanda S.
testimonials.text: Best gym I've ever been a member of. The group classes are incredible and the community is unmatched.

testimonials.name: Tyler M.
testimonials.text: As a former athlete, I needed a gym that could keep up. Iron Temple delivers every single day.

about.story: Iron Temple Fitness was founded in 2019 by Marcus Johnson with one mission: create a training environment where everybody — from first-timers to seasoned athletes — can push their limits and see real results. What started as a 2,000 sq ft garage gym has grown into Houston's most respected training facility.

values.title: Results First
values.description: Every program is built around measurable outcomes. We track progress and adjust.

values.title: Community
values.description: We're not just a gym. We're a team. Members push each other to be better.

values.title: No Ego
values.description: Leave the attitude at the door. Everyone starts somewhere.
